deviations: Canonical factorial contains 32 prompts; task-required 24 implemented as preregistered ranks 0-23.
Neutral uses a registered independent seed range; legacy-cell comparison is prompt-paired rather than same-noise paired.
placement_justification: Two independent TP1 ACE-Step 3.5B replicas on disjoint A800 GPUs; tasks deterministically sharded for throughput, with no cross-node job.
